issues.title: All keywords have zero impressions
issues.reasoning: All 89 keywords have 0 impressions over 30 days despite a $1/day budget. Keywords are either not eligible, have near-zero search volume, or are blocked by policy.
issues.action: Review keyword eligibility. Replace low-volume keywords with broader alternatives. Check geo-targeting.
issues.estimatedImpact: Could unlock up to $30/month in delivery

issues.title: Negative keyword blocking positive keyword
issues.reasoning: Negative 'sound' (broad match) blocks positive 'sound bath spa', preventing ads from showing for a keyword you want to target.
issues.action: Remove or narrow 'sound', or change to exact match to stop blocking 'sound bath spa'.

issues.title: Negative keyword blocking positive keyword
issues.reasoning: Negative 'miami' (broad match) blocks positive 'miami', preventing ads from showing for a keyword you want to target.
issues.action: Remove or narrow 'miami', or change to exact match to stop blocking 'miami'.

issues.title: Campaign has zero spend
issues.reasoning: Campaign has $1/day budget but $0 spend in 30 days — something is fundamentally blocking delivery.
issues.action: Check serving status, ad approval, billing, and targeting settings.
issues.estimatedImpact: Unlock up to $30/month in potential delivery

issues.title: Losing 41.81% impression share to ad rank
issues.reasoning: Losing 41.81% of impressions to ad rank — bids too low or Quality Score needs work.
issues.action: Improve ad relevance and landing page experience. Consider increasing bids on top keywords.
issues.estimatedImpact: Recovering 41.81% lost impressions from rank improvements

issues.title: Losing 57.21% impression share to budget
issues.reasoning: You're losing 57.21% of impressions due to budget. $60/day isn't enough — ads stop showing partway through the day.
issues.action: Increase budget from $60 to $90, or narrow keywords.
issues.estimatedImpact: Recovering 57.21% lost impressions could proportionally increase conversions
